title: Why Joels Decision Changed the Entire World
subtitle: One man standing in a hospital hallway with a gun in his hand. And what Joel decides to do inside the Firefly hospital doesn’t just change Ellie’s life.

title: Why Baldur Hated His Own Mother
subtitle: The reason Baldur hates his own mother, Freya, reveals one of the most tragic stories in the entire God of War series.

title: The Secret Prophecy About Kratos and Loki
subtitle: In God of War (2018) and God of War Ragnarök, prophecy plays a powerful role in shaping the story.

title: How Grace Ashcroft Accidentally Walked Into the Worst Investigation Ever
subtitle: She accidentally walked straight into one of the worst bio-weapon disasters in Resident Evil history.

title: Why Every Resident Evil Building Is Full of Puzzles
subtitle: If you have played almost any Resident Evil game, you have probably noticed something very strange about the buildings.

title: Jill Valentine: The Woman Chased by Nemesis More Than Anyone in Gaming History
subtitle: Jill Valentine probably holds the world record for being chased by the same boss over and over again.

title: Is Chris Redfield the Strongest Character in Resident Evil?
subtitle: If you have ever played Resident Evil 5, there is a moment that made the entire internet stop and ask the same question:  "Did he just… punch a boulder?"

title: Why did Leon S. Kennedy always like to kick doors?
subtitle: Most people open doors with their hands. Leon S. Kennedy prefers solving the problem with his boots.

title: Vì sao Resident Evil thích khóa cửa bằng puzzle? ZZZZ
subtitle: Most people open doors with their hands. Leon S. Kennedy prefers solving the problem with his boots..
